description:
Operating Area: Australia, Queensland, New South Wales

MY Cosmos II is a beautiful 106ft yacht that was initially launched in 1987 and
had a complete rebuild in 2023, resulting in a combination of the classic elegance of Lloyd's yachts and the modern luxury of the present day.

One of the standout features of Cosmos II is its ability to comfortably host 8
guests overnight in its 4 guest suites. Whether you're traveling with family or
friends, the yacht is perfect for a luxurious getaway. And don't worry if you want to throw a party; Cosmos II has ample space to accommodate up to 112 guests for events and celebrations.

But that's not all! The yacht boasts a large top deck perfect for entertaining friends while enjoying the breathtaking views. Plus, the swim platform is the perfect spot to soak in the sun or take a refreshing dip in the ocean. Cosmos II is also surveyed for 6 seater helicopter and up to 4.5 tonnes.

pricing.note:
INCLUDES: Vessel hire, GST, Fuel, Marine Crew

EXCLUDES: Catering, Beverages, Wharf Fees, Wait Staff, Chef Fees

WAIT STAFF
1 wait staff is required for every 10 guests
$400pp for 4 hours
$85pp per hour for every additional hour

WHARF FEES
$50 per wharf visit. Available wharfs: Casino, King Street, Aquarium, Campbells Cove, Eastern Pontoon, Double Bay Ferry Wharf, Rose Bay, Mosman Bay Ferry Wharf, Pyrmont Bay (End of Harris St).

SURCHARGES : Surcharges apply for public holidays and special events.
Public holiday surcharges: 25% on yacht hire, food and beverage packages, 100% on chef and wait staff fees. Special Events include: Australia Day, Boxing Day, Christmas Day, New Years Eve and New Years Day. All prices for special events are POA.

CHARTER ADDITIONS: Slide - $2000 Includes additional staff required to operate.

SWIMMING: All in-water activities require lifeguards to be employed for safety at the charterers expense. Anyone who wishes to participate in any water activities will not be permitted to consume any alcohol. $450 for a 4 hr charter $85 per additional hour Guests must BYO towels.

ALL-INCLUSIVE RATES INCLUDE:
• Meals curated by on board chef based on client preferences
• Wines and beverages from on board wine & beverage list.
• Professional crew of 5 including on board chef
• Fuel consumed while cruising the specific cruising area as outlined on
charter agreement. Some itineraries may additional fee.
• Daily guest suite housekeeping and turn down service
• All ensuites stocked with luxury amenities 
• Water sports

APA
30% APA (advanced provisioning allowance) covers the cost of the following and any funds not spent are refunded at the end of the charter.  APA covers:
• All provisions provided based on client preference sheets
• All beverages and alcohol provided based on client preference sheets
• Fuel consumed during duration of charter as specified on charter agreement
• Some itineraries may incur a relocation fee and will be POA
• All shore-based activities
• Special requests made by the charterer which are not supplied by the yacht as per the charter agreement
• Additional guests for day or evening events
• Speciality water sports not provided by yacht
